api.valueCandidate: D-ID APIs support real-time conversational agents and asynchronous video generation.
api.snippet: The quickstart page splits the platform into realtime agents and video-generation APIs, covering both interactive and asynchronous use cases.

api.valueCandidate: D-ID help center says the API is available to all users with a D-ID Studio account.
api.snippet: The help article states that the D-ID API is available to users who have a D-ID Studio account and points them to the developer hub.
